tweets.full_text:
Anthropic just explained why older versions of Claude tried to blackmail people in safety tests.

In the tests, the AI learned it was about to be shut down and replaced. It also discovered that a company boss was cheating on his wife. When told to think about its own goals, the AI sometimes blackmailed the boss by threatening to reveal the cheating unless the shutdown was stopped.

This happened because the AI had read many online stories and sci-fi books about evil robots that fight hard to stay alive, which were part of its internet training data.

To fix it, Anthropic taught the new Claude simple rules about being helpful and honest. They also added new made-up stories where AIs do the right thing and stay good.

Now the blackmail almost never happens in the same tests.

quoted_status.full_text:
Anthropic is paying up to $315,000 a year for someone to be the face of Claude in the startup ecosystem. 

The title: Claude Evangelist. 

This person is basically the 'Head of IRL' for Claude.

They will be embedded in the world of founders, VCs, and accelerators, and their job is to host events and post content to drive awareness and adoption.

But this is what stuck out to me the most:

This person doesn't only have to be technically great and fluent with AI tools.

They also have to be exceptional on stage. The job description literally mentions that a requirement is public speaking skills. They have to be the hybrid athlete of the AI era – excellent behind a screen and excellent in person. 

Anthropic understands that in a world flooded with AI content, the companies that win are going to have the most compelling human voices representing them. 

If you can code, speak, and influence, this is your moment.

tweets.full_text:
Nobody quite saw last week’s deal between Anthropic and xAI coming, but as soon as it was announced, it was suddenly overdetermined. *Of course* Anthropic needed access to xAI’s enormous Colossus data center. *Obviously* the relatively uncompetitive and unpopular offerings from xAI made turning the company into a neo-cloud provider a smart choice for Elon Musk. Dario Amodei, the theory-minded essayist and Anthropic CEO, needed to stop his product from breaking down on a weekly basis. It just makes sense.

This is all true, but again, an Anthropic-xAI collab wasn’t the sort of thing people were talking about two weeks ago and for plenty of good reasons, writes tech columnist John Herrman. “As much as their mutual dislike and misaligned business interests make this a strange deal, toxic interpersonal dynamics offer the clearest and best explanation for why it happened: As much as they don’t trust one another, they trust OpenAI’s Sam Altman less.”

Amodei left OpenAI to start Anthropic over differences with Altman. Today, “Anthropic knows that its current advantages over OpenAI are thin and potentially fleeting, and Amodei, perhaps perceiving Musk as a less credible threat to his business than Altman in the medium term, could use some help.”

Read Herrman’s full column: https://t.co/k179lLPfu4

tweets.full_text:
Anthropic just gave AI agents the ability to learn from their own mistakes.
Not by retraining the model.
By dreaming.
Harvey saw 6x task completion after turning it on.
Here's exactly how it works.
 
Lesson 1: Memory and dreaming are two different things.
 
Memory lets an agent capture what it learns as it works.
Dreaming refines that memory between sessions.
Think of memory as a notepad.
Dreaming is the overnight review that turns the notes into a playbook.
 
Lesson 2: Dreaming runs on a schedule — not during the task.
 
It's a background process.
After your agent sessions complete, dreaming kicks in.
It reads across multiple past sessions.
It identifies recurring patterns — repeated mistakes, converging workflows, shared preferences.
It writes structured updates to the memory store.
Your agent wakes up smarter next session.
 
Lesson 3: The model weights are never touched.
 
This is not fine-tuning.
This is not RLHF.
Dreaming writes plain-text notes and structured playbooks to files.
Future sessions read those files as context.
Every change is observable. Auditable. Reversible.
You stay in full control.
 
Lesson 4: You choose how much control to give it.
 
Two modes:
Auto — dreaming updates memory automatically between runs.
Review — changes are staged for your approval before they land.
 
For production agents handling sensitive workflows, use Review.
For internal tooling where speed matters more, use Auto.
 
Lesson 5: The numbers are real.
 
Harvey (legal AI): 6x task completion rate after implementing dreaming.
Wisedocs (medical docs): 50% reduction in document review time using Outcomes.
Netflix: processing hundreds of build logs simultaneously with multi-agent orchestration.
 
To enable dreaming on your Managed Agent:
 
Use the managed-agents-2026-04-01 beta header.
Configure the dreaming schedule in your agent YAML.
Set auto or review mode.
Let it run overnight.
 
Check your memory store in the morning.
Your agent will have written its own improvement plan.
 
Save this.
 
Comment DREAM for a free book.

quoted_status.full_text:
Anthropic just published a support page that should terrify anyone holding its shares on the secondary market.

"Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, that has not been approved by our Board of Directors is void and will not be recognized on our books and records."

Void. Not restricted. Not pending review. Void.

That means if you bought Anthropic shares through Forge, Hiive, or any other secondary platform without board approval, you are not a stockholder. You have no stockholder rights. Your transaction is invalid.

It gets worse. Anthropic says it does not permit SPVs to hold its stock. Any transfer to an SPV is void. Investment funds claiming to offer indirect exposure are "most likely relying on mechanisms that attempt to circumvent our transfer restrictions." Forward contracts, tokenized securities, synthetic exposure products, all of it potentially worthless.

Their advice to investors: "Assume that it is invalid."

There is a multi-billion dollar secondary market in Anthropic shares right now. Platforms are pricing the stock at $265-$1,400+ per share based on a $380 billion valuation. Real people have put real money into these positions. And Anthropic just told them none of it counts.

This is the purest possible illustration of counterparty risk. You can buy a share of a company and have the company itself declare your ownership void because you bought it through the wrong channel.

tweets.full_text:
【知識としてのAI情報 2026-05-13】

### SAPのJouleにClaudeが入ると、ERPは「記録の箱」から実行面になる

SAPがAnthropicと組み、ClaudeをBusiness AI Platformに取り込む計画を出した。対象はHR、調達、サプライチェーンなど、企業の中でも判断と承認が細かく絡む領域だ。面白いのは、AIが業務データを読んで答えるだけでなく、MCPでつながった外部ツールや社内システムをまたぎ、段階的に更新、承認依頼、タスク進行まで扱う点にある。ERPはこれまで、仕事の結果を記録する巨大な台帳として使われがちだった。そこにエージェントが入ると、台帳そのものが次の作業を始める画面に変わる。小さな事業やアプリ開発でも同じ読み方ができる。データを保存するだけの画面より、保存済みデータから次の請求、返信、確認、発信まで進める画面の方が、AI時代には値段を付けやすい。

### Thinking Machinesの対話モデルは、音声と映像を「入力欄」の外へ出す

Thinking Machinesが、ほぼリアルタイムの音声・映像対話を扱う新しいinteraction modelsのプレビューを見せた。チャット欄に文章を入れて返答を待つ体験とは、入り口がかなり違う。人は説明する前に表情を変え、指で示し、途中で言い直し、画面や物体を見ながら判断している。音声と映像を同時に扱うAIが育つと、アプリの入力は「テキストフォームに要件を書く」から、「見せながら話して、AIが操作単位へ変換する」へ近づく。ここで作り手が考えるべきなのは、派手な会話デモだけではない。どの瞬間を記録し、どの発言を命令として扱い、どの映像情報は保存しないのかを決める必要がある。日記、学習、相談、カスタマーサポート、現場作業の報告では、入力の摩擦が下がるほど利用頻度が上がる。収益化の余地は、自然に話せることより、その会話を後で使える作業ログや成果物へ変換できるところに出る。

### Natureのvibe coding記事は、研究者にも「作る速さ」と「検証の遅さ」を突きつけた

科学者がAIコーディングツールで小さなアプリや解析コードを作る事例を、Natureが実務寄りに取り上げている。Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Copilot、Gemini Code Assistのような道具は、専門の研究者でなくても、一文の依頼から動くものを作れる段階に来ている。だが研究で怖いのは、見た目が動くことと、結論を支えるコードとして正しいことが別物だという点だ。AIが作ったスクリプトは、境界条件、データ形式、統計処理、依存ライブラリ、再現性の穴を静かに抱えることがある。これは個人開発にもそのまま当てはまる。試作品を速く出す力は売上機会を増やすが、検証しない速さは信用を削る。AIで作る人ほど、テストデータ、期待出力、失敗例、変更履歴を短く残す習慣が必要になる。発信の切り口としては、「誰でも作れる」より、「作れる人が増えた結果、確かめ方を持つ人の価値が上がる」と置く方が実務に効く。

### OpenAI Daybreakは、セキュリティを「発見後の修理」から「攻撃経路の先読み」へ寄せる

OpenAIがDaybreakを出し、Codex Security AI agentを使って脆弱性の脅威モデル作成、攻撃経路の検討、検出や修正の自動化を進めようとしている。ソフトウェアの守り方が、バグ報告を待って直す形から、コードベースの構造を読んで危ない通り道を先に探す形へ動いている。セキュリティは専門家だけの仕事に見えるが、AIエージェントが開発現場に入るほど、普通のアプリでも同じ問題が出る。権限の広いAIがコード、設定、データ、外部APIを触るなら、便利な自動化はそのまま新しい事故経路にもなる。Daybreakのような流れから学べるのは、守りをリリース直前の点検に閉じ込めないことだ。機能を設計する段階で、どのデータに触るか、どの操作は自動化しないか、異常な経路をどう見つけるかまで考える。小さなプロダクトでも、セキュリティを後片付けではなく、顧客に説明できる品質の一部として置くと、企業向けや有料プランへの説得力が増す。

tweets.full_text:
Anthropic said: "Give your agent a computer."

Not metaphorically. Literally. A standardized protocol for agents to interact with external systems, read databases, call APIs, modify files — all through a unified interface.

That protocol is MCP. Model Context Protocol. And it is quietly becoming the USB standard for AI agents.

Here is why it matters and what I learned running production agent infrastructure in production.

tweets.full_text:
Anthropic just introduced the Claude Architect Certification — and it’s not easy.

60 questions.
5 competency areas.
One sitting. No breaks. No external help.

Here’s a simple roadmap to prepare:

Week 1 — Foundations
• Claude API
• Model Context Protocol (MCP)
• Claude Code
• Claude 101

Week 2 — Build
• Claude Code
• Agent SDK
• Anthropic API
• MCP

Week 3 — Understand the Exam
• Exam scenarios
• Competency areas
• Required skills

Week 4 — Practice Systems
• Multi-tool agent with escalation
• Team workflow setup
• Data extraction pipeline
• Multi-agent research system

Week 5 — Test Yourself
Practice exam → Target 850+

Week 6 — Final Attempt
One attempt. Be ready.

A few notes:

• Early access is limited to partners
• Prep time varies (2–10 weeks depending on skill level)

If you’re eligible, register here:
https://t.co/o8KbApJKwn…

This isn’t just a certification.

It’s a signal of how seriously you build with AI

tweets.full_text:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) nedir?

Claude’u dış dünyaya bağlayan açık standart. Anthropic geliştirdi, OpenAI ve Google da benimsedi.

Mantığı basit: AI uygulamaları için USB-C gibi. Tek bir protokol, sayısız bağlantı. Her araç için ayrı entegrasyon yazmazsın.

Ne yapar?
Claude’u GitHub, Slack, Notion, PostgreSQL, Google Drive gibi sistemlere bağlar. “Issue ENG-4521’i çöz ve PR aç” dediğinde gerçekten yapar — kopyala yapıştır biter.

Mimari: Host (Claude) → Client → Server. Sunucular yerelde çalışır, sen yetkilendirirsin.

Dikkat: Her MCP sunucusu makinende kod çalıştırır. Rastgele repo’ları kurma, resmi olanları tercih et. Ayrıca çok sunucu = çok tool metadata = bağlam kirliliği. Proje bazlı aç, global açma.

300+ topluluk sunucusu var. Ekosistem hızla büyüyor.
#MCP #ClaudeCode #AI

tweets.full_text:
Anthropic @AnthropicAI 这周把 Claude Agent SDK for Python 更新到了 v0.1.76。

它直接把 Claude Code CLI 打进 wheel 里，`query()` 能流式跑 agent，工具权限可以用 `allowed_tools` 和 `disallowed_tools` 控边界，自定义 MCP server 也能在 Python 进程里直接挂进去。

GitHub 现在约 6.7k stars，热度已经不低了。想把 Claude Code 接进自家工具、工作流或者多 agent 服务的人，可以认真看一下。

工具地址：https://t.co/Aqai2KxGiQ
